headline: Is Caterpillar Stock Outperforming the Nasdaq?
summary: Though Caterpillar has outpaced the broader Nasdaq Composite over the past year, Wall Street analysts remain cautiously optimistic about the stock’s prospects.

headline: Dow Jones Giants Amazon, Caterpillar Lead Five Stocks Near Buy Points
summary: Dow Jones giants Amazon and Caterpillar are setting up in short consolidations. The AI stocks lead five names near buy points.
